meaning: Royal Society of Literature (英国)皇家文学学会
examples: If the application USES an RSL, you must also deploy the RSL.
The RSL is the fourth library in the world in the size of the collection.
There is also a nice canteen in the RSL. Some come here to drink some tea in a warm and comfortable atmosphere.
Its chairman is Ronald S. Lauder (hence RSL), an heir to the Este Lauder fortune.
The RSL manager in the Netherlands secures a favorable rate from there to Turkey.
